columns.name: player_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier assigned to each player, used for tracking and referencing player data across various systems.

columns.name: gsis_id
columns.comment: The official Game Statistics and Information System identifier for the player, facilitating access to detailed statistics and game-related data.

columns.name: full_name
columns.comment: The complete name of the player, as recognized in official records and media articles.

columns.name: player_label
columns.comment: A label assigned to the player, which may include nicknames or abbreviations for easier reference in various contexts.

columns.name: name_collision
columns.comment: Indicates whether there are multiple players with similar names, which may necessitate additional context to distinguish between them.

columns.name: team
columns.comment: Identifies the team the player is currently associated with, providing context for their position and activities within the league.

columns.name: position
columns.comment: Specifies the playing position of the player, such as quarterback or wide receiver, relevant for understanding their role on the team.

columns.name: jersey_number
columns.comment: The number worn by the player on their jersey, used for identification during games and broadcasts.

columns.name: status
columns.comment: Reflects the current status of the player, such as active, injured, or retired, impacting their availability for games.

columns.name: espn_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the player used by ESPN, allowing for integration with ESPN's stats, articles, and other resources.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Represents the NFL season in which the player's data is recorded, aiding in tracking performance and historical comparisons.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Indicates the specific week of the NFL season relevant to the player's data, useful for analyzing weekly performance metrics.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: The timestamp indicating when the player's data was captured or ingested into the database, essential for data management and integrity.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: The name of the source file from which the player's data was derived, providing traceability for data origins.
